meaning: adj.轻便的,手提(式)的,便携式的
examples: This portable seat folds flat for easy storage.
There was a little portable television switched on behind the bar.
The latest disks, used for small portable computers, spin 3,600 times a minute.
They could provide portable retirement and health benefits, financial planning, worker training to boost employee value and more.
Sumitomo Trust is also said to be part of the portable-pensions initiative, along with America's Citibank.
